FR-01.title: Patient Onboarding
requirements: Register with personal and insurance details
Health questionnaire and medical history form

FR-02.title: Doctor Search and Selection
requirements: Search doctors by specialty, language, and availability
View doctor profile with credentials and reviews
Sort by rating and next available slot

FR-03.title: Video Consultation
requirements: HD video call between patient and doctor
Screen sharing for reports and images
acceptance_criteria: Video call connects with clear audio/video

FR-04.title: Appointment Scheduling
requirements: Urgent care queue for immediate consultations
Appointment reminders via SMS and email
acceptance_criteria: Urgent queue assigns next available doctor

FR-05.title: E-Prescription
requirements: Prescriptions sent to patient's preferred pharmacy

FR-07.title: Payment and Insurance
requirements: Payment receipt and claim status tracking

FR-08.title: Chat Messaging
requirements: Chat available before and after consultation

FR-09.title: Health Monitoring Integration
requirements: Connect wearable devices for vital signs
Display heart rate, BP, glucose trends

FR-01.title: Build Patient Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/patients/register with HIPAA-compliant data handling. Health questionnaire storage. ID verification service integration. Digital consent capture with timestamp.

FR-01.title: Build Patient Onboarding Flow
FR-01.description: Create registration wizard: personal details, insurance info, health questionnaire with common conditions checklist, ID upload for verification, and consent form with digital signature.

FR-02.title: Build Doctor Search API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/doctors/search with filters: specialty, language, insurance_accepted, availability. Return profiles with rating, credentials, next available slot. Sort options.

FR-02.title: Build Doctor Browse UI
FR-02.description: Create doctor search with filter sidebar, doctor cards (photo, name, specialty, rating, next slot), and doctor profile page with full credentials, reviews, and book button.

FR-03.title: Build Video Call Service
FR-03.description: Create WebRTC signaling server for peer-to-peer video. TURN/STUN server setup. Screen sharing API. In-call notes endpoint. Recording with storage (patient consent check).

FR-03.title: Build Video Consultation UI
FR-03.description: Create video call screen with remote/local video panels, mute/camera toggles, screen share button, end call button, doctor notes panel, and connection quality indicator.

FR-04.title: Build Scheduling API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/doctors/:id/availability. POST /api/appointments (scheduled). POST /api/urgent-care/queue (immediate). Reminder scheduler via SMS/email at configurable intervals.

FR-04.title: Build Scheduling UI
FR-04.description: Create booking flow with doctor availability calendar, time slot selector, consultation type (video/chat), and confirmation. Urgent care button with queue position display.

FR-05.title: Build E-Prescription API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/prescriptions (medications, dosage, frequency, duration, pharmacy_id). Drug interaction check against patient medication list. Digital verification code. Pharmacy notification.

FR-05.title: Build Prescription UI
FR-05.description: Create doctor prescription form with medication search, dosage fields, interaction warning display, pharmacy selector, and patient prescription list with verification codes.

FR-06.title: Build Medical Records API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/patients/:id/records (HIPAA-compliant). POST /api/consultations/:id/notes (doctor notes). Lab results import. POST /api/records/:id/share (secure link with expiry).

FR-06.title: Build Records Viewer
FR-06.description: Create medical records page with timeline view, consultation notes, lab results with normal range indicators, and secure sharing button with recipient email and expiry.

FR-07.title: Build Payment and Insurance API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/payments/consultation (charge at booking). POST /api/insurance/claim (submit to provider). Copay calculation from insurance plan. Receipt and claim tracking.

FR-07.title: Build Payment UI
FR-07.description: Create payment form at booking with insurance selector, copay display, card payment option. Insurance claim status tracker. Payment history with receipts.

FR-08.title: Build Chat API
FR-08.description: Create async messaging endpoints with image support. Pre/post consultation chat per appointment. Auto-response system when doctor is unavailable. Secure message storage.

FR-08.title: Build Chat UI
FR-08.description: Create chat interface with message thread, image attachment for symptom photos, auto-response indicator, and link to related consultation.

FR-09.title: Build Health Monitoring API
FR-09.description: Create POST /api/health/sync (wearable device data). GET /api/health/vitals/:type/trends. Abnormal reading detection and doctor alert. Export health summary PDF.

FR-09.title: Build Health Dashboard
FR-09.description: Create patient health page with vital sign trend charts (heart rate, BP, glucose), device sync status, abnormal reading highlights, and export button.

FR-10.title: Build Doctor Dashboard API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/doctor/schedule, /api/doctor/queue (waiting patients), /api/doctor/patients/:id (quick record access), /api/doctor/earnings (consultation reports).

FR-10.title: Build Doctor Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create doctor home with today's schedule, patient queue with join call buttons, quick patient search with record access, and earnings chart with consultation count.
